articles.title: Woman, 25, dead, driver and 3 children hospitalized in crash on I-495 in Andover
articles.description:
The three children involved had "unknown injuries," State Police said, while an adult suffered serious injuries in the crash.

The post Woman, 25, dead, driver and 3 children hospitalized in crash on I-495 in Andover appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 25-year-old woman died in a crash on I-495 in Andover.
Three children were hospitalized with unknown injuries; an adult suffered serious injuries.
The incident raises concerns about road safety for Boston commuters.

articles.title: 3 longtime tenants to close or move after Alpha Management buys prominent Allston commercial building
articles.description:
Three tenants from the Allston building – the Pet Shop, Ritual Arts, and Regeneration Tattoo – say they're now being priced out.

The post 3 longtime tenants to close or move after Alpha Management buys prominent Allston commercial building appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alpha Management purchased a prominent Allston commercial building, affecting local businesses.
Three tenants, including the Pet Shop, Ritual Arts, and Regeneration Tattoo, are being priced out.
Closure or relocation of these businesses may impact community services and local culture.
